header: One workspace for the whole content lifecycle
subheadline: Plan, build, and ship pages without leaving the editor your team already knows.

items.title: Map every page before you build it
items.description: Draft structure, assign owners, and track status in a shared board. Editors see what is in progress and what is ready to publish, so nothing stalls in review.

items.title: Compose pages from reusable blocks
items.description: Drag pre-approved content blocks into place and edit copy inline. Brand tokens keep every layout on-style, so non-designers ship pages that look designed.

items.title: Ship to production in one click
items.description: Preview on real breakpoints, schedule the go-live, and roll back instantly if needed. Versioning keeps a full history of every change you make.

items.title: See what each page earns
items.description: Built-in analytics tie traffic and conversions back to the blocks on the page, so you double down on the layouts that actually move the numbers.
